beIN SPORTS 7.title: Lorenzo Sonego (ITA) vs Andrey Rublev - ATP 500 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
beIN SPORTS 7.desc: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. Featuring a 32-player singles draw, it offers around €2.8m in prize money, with top-ranked players competing for 500 ranking points ahead of the major clay-court tournaments.
